privacy.content:
Privacy Policy

This privacy policy aims to inform you about how we handle users' personal data on the www.ratemyroommate.hu website.

1. Data Controller

Email: rmrm.owners@gmail.com

2. Personal Data Collected

During use of the website, we may collect the following data:

  • Username, email address (via Google Auth)
  • IP address and browser information
  • Data stored by cookies (e.g. login state)
  • Phone number (optional, publicly visible if provided)
  • Quiz responses (optional)

3. Legal Basis for Processing

Data processing is based on the user's consent (e.g. when logging in) or our legitimate interest (e.g. statistical data collection, system security).

4. Purpose of Data Processing

  • Creating and managing user accounts
  • Saving and displaying quiz results
  • Improving user experience
  • Ensuring website functionality

5. Cookie Management

Our website uses cookies essential for operation. These cookies do not require separate consent. We do not currently use third-party or marketing cookies.

6. Data Retention

Personal data is retained as long as the user account is active, or as required by law. Data is deleted when the account is deleted.

7. Data Transfers and Processors

We do not transfer data to third parties, except:

  • Service providers: e.g. Supabase (database), Vercel (hosting)
  • Authorities when required by law

8. User Rights

Users have the right to:

  • Request information about data processing
  • Access their own data
  • Request correction or deletion of their data
  • Request restriction of processing
  • Request data portability

9. Contact

For any data protection related questions, please contact us:
Email: rmrm.owners@gmail.com

Last updated: 2025-09-28
